subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One, in all conditions, remembereth the loved ones of God, through pure deeds and praiseworthy conduct [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در جمیع احوال اولیای حق را ذکر مینماید و باعمال طیبه و اخلاق مرضیه
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action
